Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The main character's {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}[n]and determination lit a fire in my soul...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The cinematic shots filled with beauty and[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} made me appreciate the arts...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching the characters use body language to[n]communicate honed my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Watching how the kids faced their[n]fears gave me some {f 4 30 2 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}My heart was captivated by the[n]{f 4 30 1 1 1 0} in this epic love story...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Seeing someone earnestly pursue the[n]truth helped refine my {f 4 30 0 1 1 0}...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Вже пізно... Мені треба[n]повертатися до гуртожитку.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Tch, you think some two-bit merc like you has what it takes to kill me!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Son, you're the one who'll take over the family, so save yourself. Get the hell out of here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I won't become your successor... but no way am I leaving you behind! You're my father-in-law![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can't... I can't look... The top of the tower... It's terrifying![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You'll be all right. That point can't hurt you. Go on, take a look. It's not even that sharp.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Open your eyes. It's Paris, the most beautiful city in the world. Face forward, turn away from your past...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}All right, Taro. Ready for the first session of your private English lessons? Repeat after me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_043_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Nancy, could you stop hogging him? Taro is going out to eat dak hanmari with me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Hold on now, So-yeon. Taro and I have a date at the museum today. He must witness the beauty of French art himself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Look behind you, children... Fear me! Scream and cower before me![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Eek! The anatomical model from the science lab is moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That's scientifically impossible. It's just a lame prank. I'm not gonna turn around and look like an idiot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...While the newly excavated box itself dates back to the Heian era, the letter inside appears to be written in modern Japanese...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Th-That's it! That's my letter! It really did travel back in time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That means... you really did get my message—that I love you, Murasaki Shikibu.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_054_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This must be the method the culprit used to seemingly vanish into thin air.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see. The statute of limitations ran out three years ago, but with modern technology, we may be able to shed some light on this case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Perhaps... But it's just as likely we may never discover the truth—like the past 127 cases.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Just crossing the street is going to take twenty minutes at my current size![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}And it's way too dangerous, what with all these kids running around and the dogs out for walks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}But I'm not giving up! Nothing's gonna stand in my way! Just you wait, 3rd Street![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Agent G, this is a covert operation. Wouldn't your cover be blown by your attire?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you think me incompetent? My outfit hardly matters when the enemy won't notice a thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Right then. The next time I'll be in contact, it's to report a mission well done. Now, allons-y![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That testimony is bullshit, man! YOU'RE the real perp![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Ugh... My plan was perfect. I just didn't account for you showing up on your motorcycle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Heh! I swear on my sick-ass hair that I'll solve any case—and don't you forget it![n]{f 1 1}
